notes: Ran great out of the box. Only had to set resolution and full screen. Needed to restart the game for the settings to apply.
title: Sailaway - The Sailing Simulator

notes: Started the game and sailed around a bit with my boat. Everything worked fine.
title: Sailaway - The Sailing Simulator

notes:
On first try, game crashed on start and the whole Steam client crashed with it. On second try, I got a notice about missing directX files. 
Latest AMD driver is installed, Vulcan is installed. I wasn't able to get the PRO version to activate on Linux Mint, so the systems keeps running with open drivers. As far other testers reported, Nvidia graphics/drivers seem to work.
title: Sailaway - The Sailing Simulator

notes:
First attempt crashed, so I gave it another try after a while. Can't add to my first 'borked' report, so I write a new one. 

After a while I read about the proton starting options and gave it a try. 
First I used 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%', but the handling was cluncky and some features like changing ship color not working. 
In my second try I used 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=2 %command%' and game starts and runs without a problem. Due to open drivers the details of ship and scenery aren't too nice, but acceptable.
title: Sailaway - The Sailing Simulator

notes: Everything run perfectly as on the native OS
title: Sailaway - The Sailing Simulator

notes: Started up as if it were in windows. Used 4.2-9 Even used highest settings for everything.
title: Sailaway - The Sailing Simulator
